creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 215033
py-wagtail-switch-to-origin-ports.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is the patch that assigns www/py-wagtail to the origin Django ports which have recently been switched from Django 1.11 to Django 2.2.

Bump PORTREVISION due changed dependencies.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
